roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
DEFT'S MOT TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF OWN RECOGNIZANCE / ACM RELEASE FILED

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X  THE COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT  TO ADD COUNT 2, PC 487(A) MISDEMEANOR, AS TO DEFENDANT MAILIYAH ALAPATI,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/IBARRA/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/ARBUCKLE/X:DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED FOR PERIOD OF 6 MONTHS,  AS A CONDITION OF DEJ THE DEFENDANT MUST CONTINUE PARTICIPATION WITH SUNSET YOUTH PROGRAM, MAINTAIN EMPLOYMENT AND INCUR NO NEW CASES,/CTORD:ACM AND SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS TERMINATED/CONTD:DISMISSAL OR SENTENCE ON DEJ/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO TRANSPORTBY ACM AND REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/DEF:TO BRING PROOF OF SCHOOL OR PROGRAM/TEXT:DEFTENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-13-20/987,2/ /SA1:CHINELO OLORUNFEMI/SAORD3/SA4:WALGREENS AT 135 POWELL STREET IN SF/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:DISMISSAL OR DEJ SENTENCING/DAWT/CTORD:NOLO PLEA AS TO COUNT 2 SET ASIDE AND NG PLEA REINSTATED/MO PC 1385: PER NEGOTIATED AGREEMENT OF PARTIE
